testcase.name: test_preamble
testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio @pytest.mark.integration async def test_preamble(): > preamble_text = await speedtest.preamble() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

cf_speedtest/speedtest.py:134: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_main
testcase.failure:

testcase.error:
fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='mock_requests_session' scope='function' baseid='tests'> request = <SubRequest 'mock_requests_session' for <Function test_main_unit[args0-0]>>
@pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True) def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None: asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config) if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func): if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT: # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example > return (yield) ^^^^^
.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:728: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ tests/conftest.py:17: in mock_requests_session with patch('cf_speedtest.speedtest.REQ_SESSION') as mock_session: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/unittest/mock.py:1503: in __enter__ original, local = self.get_original() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <unittest.mock._patch object at 0x10a583650>
def get_original(self): target = self.getter() name = self.attribute
original = DEFAULT local = False
try: original = target.__dict__[name] except (AttributeError, KeyError): original = getattr(target, name, DEFAULT) else: local = True
if name in _builtins and isinstance(target, ModuleType): self.create = True
if not self.create and original is DEFAULT: > raise AttributeError( "%s does not have the attribute %r" % (target, name) ) E AttributeError: <module 'cf_speedtest.speedtest' from '/Users/namugo/Desktop/대학대학/1. Spring 2026/CS-UH 3260 004 Software Analytics/Assignments/Replication 2/Replication_MigrateLib/repos/12932@cf-speedtest__78d9ee1d__requests__aiohttp/cf_speedtest/speedtest.py'> does not have the attribute 'REQ_SESSION'
